subject: [POLICY] Dbmigrator image definition corrected
commit_message:
[POLICY] Dbmigrator image definition corrected

image definition in job.yaml must use repositoryGenerator

Issue-ID: OOM-2906

Signed-off-by: Andreas Geissler <andreas-geissler@telekom.de>
Change-Id: I5b708d9e1509b333cb494aa4417e7f1715da4ec8

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4467/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4467/ )
